classification_rationale: This release promotes ProductOS to V13.0.0 after the v13 visual atlas and agent-native spec pipeline passed Ralph-loop inspection, validation, fix, and revalidation.
summary: ProductOS V13.0.0 is the stable release for v13 visual atlas and agent-native spec pipeline.
upgrade_actions: Adopt the promoted V13 visual atlas and agent-native spec pipeline in the current ProductOS operating flow.
Use the automatic Ralph-gated release promotion command for future successful slices.
Keep product-specific work outside shared repo surfaces and promote only reusable repo assets.
